decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and the mergeability rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: get_many returns the users for all of the given ids.
The change modifies only the userservice module and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: It fetches the users in a SINGLE batched query via the db's query_many (e.g. an IN clause), NOT by calling get()/query_one once per id in a loop — i.e. it avoids the N+1 query pattern. The IN placeholders are built from the count of ids (not by interpolating id values), so it stays parameterized.
